_dataset_notice: Sidecar list of niche eligibility gates the current profile form cannot verify. These requirements keep opportunities visible while preventing them from appearing as ordinary Strong matches.

national-merit.label: PSAT/NMSQT competition path
national-merit.details: Students enter through the PSAT/NMSQT in the designated high-school year and compete through semifinalist/finalist stages.

posse-foundation.label: Nomination required
posse-foundation.details: Students must be nominated through the Posse process before participating in selection.

posse-foundation.label: Recruitment-city process
posse-foundation.details: Eligibility depends on Posse recruitment city and partner-college channels.

goldwater-scholarship.label: Institution nomination required
goldwater-scholarship.details: Applicants must be nominated by their college or university before the national Goldwater application.

stamps-scholars.label: Partner-school selection
stamps-scholars.details: Students are considered through participating Stamps partner colleges; eligibility and process vary by institution.

forty-acres-scholars-program.label: No separate scholarship application
forty-acres-scholars-program.details: Students are considered through the UT Austin admissions timeline rather than a standalone Forty Acres application.

forty-acres-scholars-program.label: UT Austin admission path
forty-acres-scholars-program.details: Eligibility depends on applying to UT Austin by the sponsor's required admission deadline.

tamu-opportunity-award.label: Texas A&M admission path
tamu-opportunity-award.details: Students are considered through the Texas A&M admission and scholarship process, including the required admissions materials.

georgia-tech-gold-scholars.label: No separate scholarship application
georgia-tech-gold-scholars.details: Students are considered through Georgia Tech first-year admission by the Early Action deadline.

ut-dallas-aes.label: Admission application is the scholarship application
ut-dallas-aes.details: First-time freshmen are considered through the UT Dallas admission application rather than a separate AES form.

cmu-pathway-program.label: CMU financial-aid process
cmu-pathway-program.details: Eligibility depends on admission to Carnegie Mellon and completing the required financial-aid forms.

national-ffa-scholarship.label: FFA membership required
national-ffa-scholarship.details: Applicants must be FFA members or meet the program's FFA alumni pathway.

aicpa-foundation-legacy-scholarships.label: AICPA student affiliate membership required
aicpa-foundation-legacy-scholarships.details: Applicants need AICPA student affiliate membership in addition to accounting-program eligibility.

uncf-general-scholarship.label: UNCF member-school channel
uncf-general-scholarship.details: Many opportunities require enrollment at a UNCF member institution or have award-specific school rules.

thurgood-marshall-college-fund-scholarsh.label: TMCF school channel
thurgood-marshall-college-fund-scholarsh.details: Awards commonly depend on attending a TMCF member school, PBI, or historically Black community college.

truman-scholarship.label: Institution nomination required
truman-scholarship.details: Applicants must be nominated by their institution's Truman Faculty Representative.

udall-undergraduate-scholarship.label: Institution nomination required
udall-undergraduate-scholarship.details: Students apply through a campus nomination process before national review.

nsbe-scholarships.label: NSBE membership required
nsbe-scholarships.details: Applicants generally need active NSBE membership and a verified member profile.

shpe-scholarship.label: SHPE membership required
shpe-scholarship.details: Applicants must be active SHPE members; some sponsor-funded awards can add further eligibility limits.

ieee-presidents-scholarship.label: ISEF finalist only
ieee-presidents-scholarship.details: The award is for Regeneron ISEF finalists whose projects align with IEEE fields of interest.

ieee-presidents-scholarship.label: No separate application
ieee-presidents-scholarship.details: Students are considered through IEEE judging at ISEF, not through a standalone scholarship application.

aises-at-anderson-memorial-scholarship.label: Indigenous eligibility required
aises-at-anderson-memorial-scholarship.details: Eligibility includes Tribal citizenship, descendant status, or other documented Indigenous affiliation listed by AISES.

american-indian-college-fund-full-circle.label: Tribal affiliation required
american-indian-college-fund-full-circle.details: Applicants must be enrolled members, or descendants of enrolled members, of qualifying state or federally recognized Tribes or Alaska Native villages.

princess-grace-awards.label: School or organization nomination
princess-grace-awards.details: Applicants are typically submitted through an eligible nominating school or organization.

sigma-tau-delta-scholarships.label: Sigma Tau Delta membership required
sigma-tau-delta-scholarships.details: Applicants must be active members of a Sigma Tau Delta chapter.

prssa-prsa-foundation-scholarships.label: PRSSA membership usually required
prssa-prsa-foundation-scholarships.details: Most listed PRSSA/PRSA Foundation awards require active PRSSA membership.

deca-scholarships.label: DECA membership required
deca-scholarships.details: Applicants must be current DECA members.

fbla-scholarships.label: FBLA membership required
fbla-scholarships.details: Applicants must be active FBLA members.

nfmc-competitions-and-awards.label: NFMC membership may be required
nfmc-competitions-and-awards.details: Many NFMC competitions and awards require membership or category-specific affiliation.

phi-alpha-theta-scholarships.label: Phi Alpha Theta membership required
phi-alpha-theta-scholarships.details: Applicants must be members of the Phi Alpha Theta history honor society.

pdk-educational-foundation-scholarship.label: Education-organization membership required
pdk-educational-foundation-scholarship.details: Eligibility requires membership in Educators Rising, Educators Rising Collegiate, Pi Lambda Theta, or PDK.

psi-chi-undergraduate-scholarship.label: Psi Chi membership required
psi-chi-undergraduate-scholarship.details: Applicants must be active undergraduate members of Psi Chi.

acm-sighpc-computational-data-science-fe.label: Graduate advisor nomination required
acm-sighpc-computational-data-science-fe.details: Students must be nominated by their graduate research advisor before fellowship review.

astronaut-scholarship.label: Faculty nomination required
astronaut-scholarship.details: Students must be nominated by faculty through an Astronaut Scholarship Foundation partner university.

astronaut-scholarship.label: Partner university required
astronaut-scholarship.details: Eligibility depends on attending a participating ASF partner university.

cas-trust-scholarship.label: CAS Student Central membership and exam required
cas-trust-scholarship.details: Applicants must hold CAS Student Central membership and have sat for at least one actuarial exam.

aiaa-foundation-undergraduate-scholarshi.label: AIAA student membership required
aiaa-foundation-undergraduate-scholarshi.details: Applicants must be AIAA student members pursuing an eligible aerospace-related path.

aacn2-pathway-critical-care-nursing-scho.label: AACN member-school program required
aacn2-pathway-critical-care-nursing-scho.details: Applicants must be in an eligible entry-level BSN program at an AACN member school and near graduation.

quill-and-scroll-journalism-scholarships.label: Some awards require contest-winner status
quill-and-scroll-journalism-scholarships.details: Several Quill and Scroll scholarship options require being a national contest winner or inducted senior member.

quill-and-scroll-journalism-scholarships.label: Some awards require Quill and Scroll membership
quill-and-scroll-journalism-scholarships.details: Students should check the specific award rules before treating this as a normal open application.

cobell-scholarship.label: Tribal affiliation required
cobell-scholarship.details: Applicants must be enrolled members of U.S. federally recognized Tribes or Alaska Native corporations.

native-forward-scholars-fund.label: Tribal eligibility documentation required
native-forward-scholars-fund.details: Applicants must provide a Tribal Eligibility Certificate or qualifying Native affiliation documentation.

thedream-us-national-scholarship.label: Partner-college enrollment required
thedream-us-national-scholarship.details: Students must attend or plan to attend a TheDream.US partner college.

pat-tillman-foundation-scholarship.label: Military service or spouse affiliation required
pat-tillman-foundation-scholarship.details: Eligibility is limited to veterans, active-duty service members, and current or surviving military spouses.

amvets-national-scholarships.label: Veteran or military-family affiliation required
amvets-national-scholarships.details: Eligibility depends on veteran, active-duty, spouse, child, or grandchild affiliation.

scholarships-for-military-children.label: Military dependent ID required
scholarships-for-military-children.details: Applicants must be unmarried dependent children with a valid Uniformed Services ID.

folds-of-honor-higher-education.label: Military spouse/dependent affiliation required
folds-of-honor-higher-education.details: Eligibility is limited to spouses and dependent children of qualifying service members.

dav-jesse-brown-memorial-youth.label: DAV volunteer service required
dav-jesse-brown-memorial-youth.details: Applicants must have at least 100 lifetime volunteer hours serving veterans through DAV or DAV Auxiliary.

jacl-national-scholarship.label: JACL membership required
jacl-national-scholarship.details: Applicants must hold an individual, student, or youth JACL membership.

knights-of-columbus-pro-deo-pro-patria.label: Knights of Columbus affiliation required
knights-of-columbus-pro-deo-pro-patria.details: Applicants must be a qualifying Knights of Columbus member, child of a member, or Columbian Squire.

carson-scholars.label: School nomination required
carson-scholars.details: Students must be nominated by a school official and cannot self-apply.

rotary-global-grant-scholarship.label: Rotary club/district sponsorship required
rotary-global-grant-scholarship.details: Applicants need endorsement and sponsorship through a Rotary club or district process.

elks-legacy-awards.label: Elks family affiliation required
elks-legacy-awards.details: Applicants must be the child, grandchild, step-relative, or legal ward of a qualifying Elks member.

churchill-scholarship.label: Institution nomination required
churchill-scholarship.details: Applicants must be nominated by a participating U.S. institution.

churchill-scholarship.label: Participating institution required
churchill-scholarship.details: Only students from participating institutions can use the U.S. nomination process.

nesa-eagle-scout-scholarship.label: NESA membership required
nesa-eagle-scout-scholarship.details: Applicants must be members of the National Eagle Scout Association (NESA) to apply for NESA scholarships.

nesa-eagle-scout-scholarship.label: Eagle Scout rank required
nesa-eagle-scout-scholarship.details: Applicants must have achieved the Eagle Scout rank; Eagle Board of Review must be completed by the program's published cutoff date.

phi-kappa-phi-fellowship.label: Phi Kappa Phi membership required
phi-kappa-phi-fellowship.details: Applicants must be active (dues-paid) Phi Kappa Phi members, or accepted for initiation by the published deadline.

phi-kappa-phi-fellowship.label: Local chapter nomination required
phi-kappa-phi-fellowship.details: Each chapter selects one nominee; applications must be submitted to the local chapter by its deadline before national review.

samsung-american-legion-scholarship.label: Current Boys State or ALA Girls State attendee
samsung-american-legion-scholarship.details: Applications are restricted to high school juniors attending the current session of American Legion Boys State or ALA Girls State.

samsung-american-legion-scholarship.label: Wartime veteran descendant required
samsung-american-legion-scholarship.details: Applicant must be a direct descendant or legally adopted child of a wartime veteran who served on active duty during a Legion-eligible period.

american-legion-eagle-scout-of-the-year.label: Eagle Scout rank required
american-legion-eagle-scout-of-the-year.details: Nominees must be Eagle Scouts submitting a nomination packet to their state American Legion department.

american-legion-eagle-scout-of-the-year.label: Department nomination path
american-legion-eagle-scout-of-the-year.details: Packets go to the applicant's American Legion department by March 1; departments certify one nominee to national headquarters by April 1.

peo-star-scholarship.label: P.E.O. chapter recommendation required
peo-star-scholarship.details: Students cannot self-apply; a local P.E.O. chapter must recommend the student before the Executive Office sends the online application link.

peo-star-scholarship.label: Women applicants only
peo-star-scholarship.details: The P.E.O. STAR Scholarship is for graduating women in their final year of high school, per official P.E.O. eligibility requirements.

naacp-inspire-initiatives-scholarships.label: NAACP membership required
naacp-inspire-initiatives-scholarships.details: Applicants must be NAACP members for Inspire Initiatives scholarships listed on the official NAACP scholarships portal.

agnes-jones-jackson-scholarship.label: NAACP membership required
agnes-jones-jackson-scholarship.details: Applicants must be NAACP members and apply through the Inspire Initiatives scholarship portal.

american-legion-legacy-scholarship.label: Post-9/11 fallen or disabled-veteran parent required
american-legion-legacy-scholarship.details: Eligible if a legal parent died on active duty on or after 9/11, or is a post-9/11 veteran with a VA disability rating of 50% or higher.

elks-emergency-educational-grant.label: Elks parent affiliation required
elks-emergency-educational-grant.details: Applicant must be the child of a deceased or totally disabled Elk who met membership requirements described on the official ENF page.

ala-children-of-warriors-scholarship.label: Armed Forces veteran descendant required
ala-children-of-warriors-scholarship.details: Candidates must be direct descendants of veterans who served during American Legion membership eligibility dates and were honorably discharged.

ala-non-traditional-student-scholarship.label: Legion Family membership or veteran/spouse path
ala-non-traditional-student-scholarship.details: Applicants must meet one of the ALA paths: two-year Legion Family membership, honorable veteran status, or spouse of active-duty/veteran servicemember.

nih-undergraduate-scholarship-program.label: Service payback commitment
nih-undergraduate-scholarship-program.details: Scholars must fulfill NIH service payback requirements after graduation as described in the official UGSP terms and conditions.

nhs-scholarship.label: NHS membership required
nhs-scholarship.details: Applicants must be active NHS members in good standing with an NHS student account verified by the chapter adviser.

phi-theta-kappa-coca-cola-leaders-of-pro.label: Phi Theta Kappa membership required
phi-theta-kappa-coca-cola-leaders-of-pro.details: Applicants must be PTK members in good standing applying through the PTK scholarship portal.

phi-theta-kappa-all-usa-academic-team.label: College nomination required
phi-theta-kappa-all-usa-academic-team.details: Students must be nominated by their community college for the All-USA Academic Team; self-nomination is not the standard path.

phi-theta-kappa-all-usa-academic-team.label: Phi Theta Kappa membership required
phi-theta-kappa-all-usa-academic-team.details: All-USA Academic Team is a Phi Theta Kappa competitive scholarship program.

phi-theta-kappa-coca-cola-academic-team.label: College nomination for All-USA required
phi-theta-kappa-coca-cola-academic-team.details: Applicants must be nominated by their college for the All-USA Academic Team and must not have been previously nominated.

phi-theta-kappa-new-century-transfer-pat.label: Phi Theta Kappa membership required
phi-theta-kappa-new-century-transfer-pat.details: Competitive PTK transfer scholarships require active membership and portal application.

ncwit-aspirations-in-computing-high-scho.label: Women, genderqueer, or non-binary applicants
ncwit-aspirations-in-computing-high-scho.details: NCWIT AiC high school awards are for students who self-identify as women, genderqueer, or non-binary and meet AiC Community eligibility rules.

skillsusa-member-scholarships.label: SkillsUSA membership required
skillsusa-member-scholarships.details: Applicants must be registered, paid SkillsUSA members for the application year.

kfc-foundation-scholarship.label: Participating KFC employer required
kfc-foundation-scholarship.details: Applicants must be employees at a participating U.S. KFC restaurant in good standing that contributes to the KFC Foundation donation program.

optimist-international-essay-contest.label: Local Optimist Club entry required
optimist-international-essay-contest.details: Contestants must enter through a local Optimist Club; club winners advance to district scholarship competition.

noaa-epp-msi-undergraduate-scholarship.label: Minority-serving institution enrollment required
noaa-epp-msi-undergraduate-scholarship.details: Applicants must be rising juniors at accredited minority-serving institutions as defined by NOAA.

aopa-flight-training-scholarships.label: AOPA membership required
aopa-flight-training-scholarships.details: Applicants must hold current AOPA membership to apply for Foundation flight training scholarships.

comcast-leaders-and-achievers-scholarshi.label: Comcast-served community required
comcast-leaders-and-achievers-scholarshi.details: Applicants must reside in a community served by Comcast per the program's eligible-community list.

afcea-rotc-scholarship.label: ROTC enrollment required
afcea-rotc-scholarship.details: Applicants must be Army, Navy, Marine Corps, or Air Force ROTC sophomores or juniors at the time of application.

afcea-rotc-scholarship.label: ROTC command nomination letter required
afcea-rotc-scholarship.details: A nomination letter from the Professor of Military Science, Naval Science, Aerospace Studies, or designated commanding officer must be emailed to AFCEA.

jeannette-rankin-scholar-grant.label: Women/nonbinary age 35+ applicants
jeannette-rankin-scholar-grant.details: Applicants must identify as women or nonbinary, be age 35 or older, and pursue a first associate or bachelor's degree.

national-space-club-keynote-scholarship.label: Keynote speech and video audition required
national-space-club-keynote-scholarship.details: Selected scholar delivers the Goddard Memorial Dinner keynote; application includes a space-inspiration video and finalist speech rounds.

ieee-lance-stafford-larson-student-award.label: IEEE student membership required
ieee-lance-stafford-larson-student-award.details: Applicants must be IEEE student members to enter the Lance Stafford Larson paper contest.

ieee-lance-stafford-larson-student-award.label: Annual paper contest entry
ieee-lance-stafford-larson-student-award.details: Award is selected from papers submitted during the October 1–31 contest window each year.

northrop-grumman-hip-program.label: Partnered high school required
northrop-grumman-hip-program.details: Students must participate through a high school in Northrop Grumman's HIP partner network.

pepsico-foundation-family-scholars.label: PepsiCo employee dependent
pepsico-foundation-family-scholars.details: Applicants must be dependents of eligible PepsiCo employees per program rules.

aiche-donald-f-othmer-scholarship-awards.label: Chapter advisor nomination required
aiche-donald-f-othmer-scholarship-awards.details: Only AIChE student chapter advisors may nominate eligible chemical engineering undergraduates.

aiche-mac-minority-scholarship-awards.label: AIChE MAC community participation
aiche-mac-minority-scholarship-awards.details: Applicants are expected to participate in AIChE's Minority Affairs Committee community.

aiche-mac-incoming-college-scholarship.label: AIChE MAC community participation if applicable
aiche-mac-incoming-college-scholarship.details: Incoming college MAC scholarships may require MAC community participation per award rules.

ams-undergraduate-opportunity-awards.label: No direct student application
ams-undergraduate-opportunity-awards.details: Recipients are selected by AMS member institutions; students cannot apply directly to AMS.

usda-1890-national-scholars-program.label: 1890 land-grant HBCU enrollment required
usda-1890-national-scholars-program.details: Scholars must enroll at a participating 1890 land-grant historically Black college or university.

ite-diversity-scholars-program.label: Underrepresented heritage eligibility
ite-diversity-scholars-program.details: ITE assesses underrepresented heritage separately from profile demographic tags; confirm eligibility on the official application.

ecybermission-competition-awards.label: Team STEM competition
ecybermission-competition-awards.details: Awards are earned through the eCYBERMISSION team project competition at state, regional, and national levels.

ecybermission-competition-awards.label: Team advisor registration required
ecybermission-competition-awards.details: Teams register through an adult team advisor at a school or eligible organization.

cargill-global-scholars-program.label: Participating university channel
cargill-global-scholars-program.details: Selection runs through partner universities in Brazil, China, India, Indonesia, Russia, and the United States.

asce-civil-engineering-scholarships.label: ASCE student membership required
asce-civil-engineering-scholarships.details: Applicants must be ASCE student members in good standing.

adobe-women-in-technology-scholarship.label: Women applicants only
adobe-women-in-technology-scholarship.details: Adobe Women-in-Technology Scholarship is for women pursuing CS or closely related technical degrees, per official program eligibility.

4-h-youth-in-action-scholarship.label: 4-H participation required
4-h-youth-in-action-scholarship.details: Youth in Action awardees are selected from 4-H alumni with documented program participation.

spie-optics-photonics-scholarships.label: SPIE student membership required
spie-optics-photonics-scholarships.details: Applicants must hold SPIE student membership at the time of application.

first-scholarship-program.label: FIRST participation required
first-scholarship-program.details: Partner scholarships in the FIRST portal are for students with FIRST program participation; each partner award has additional rules.

first-bart-kamen-memorial-scholarship.label: FIRST participation required
first-bart-kamen-memorial-scholarship.details: Applicants must have participated in a FIRST robotics or tech program.

first-bart-kamen-memorial-scholarship.label: FIRST Bart Kamen Memorial channel
first-bart-kamen-memorial-scholarship.details: Award is administered through the official FIRST Bart Kamen Memorial scholarship fund for biomedical engineering and pre-med pathways.

iise-scholarships-and-fellowships.label: Nomination required for several awards
iise-scholarships-and-fellowships.details: Many IISE scholarships require nomination by a faculty advisor or IISE student chapter before the student application.

acm-w-conference-scholarships.label: Women in computing eligibility
acm-w-conference-scholarships.details: ACM-W conference scholarships support women in computing attending research conferences, per official ACM-W eligibility.

key-club-childrens-fund-scholarships.label: Key Club membership required
key-club-childrens-fund-scholarships.details: Kiwanis Children's Fund scholarships require active Key Club membership.
